name: notepad-monorepo
description: Premium Notepad Web Application with Microservices

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:notes" "npm run dev:live"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../services/auth-service && npm install && cd ../notes-service && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../live-service && npm install
